pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for OUTPUT_PATH='/home/ga/Documents/compliance_report.csv'.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetic data dynamically seeded into the 'seb-server-mariadb' MariaDB container during setup. The database uses an Entity-Attribute-Value (EAV) schema to store configurations. The expected output file path for the generated compliance report is confirmed to be '/home/ga/Documents/compliance_report.csv', as explicitly evaluated by the scoring script.
